rows.label: qev035102_MSG0001
rows.name: ...[ST:playername ]! That's enough, it's fine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Leave the rest to me... I'll show you
the secret arts of the Bias, polished
through ten thousand years of battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Yes... Yes... Calm
your consciousness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Your master is Zarch Quokett. If you
disobey, your limbs will be crushed, and
an agony worse than death will strike you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0005
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0006
rows.name:
Alright... The training is
complete! With this, Odsent
is mine for sure this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0007
rows.name:
Thank you for sticking with me this far.
Now, by using this guy, my dream...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0008
rows.name:
The dream of massacring the hateful
Cavern Clan can be realized![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hahaha! Just like Odsent's name, he'll
carve open the future... No, their guts!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev035102_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if the job is complete.

rows.label: qev035102_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Stop him by saying revenge
only breeds more hatred.

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yeah, it's perfect! Since I don't have
anything on me right now, I'll give you
your reward once we're back in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hehe... I'll head back first,
so come back quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0012
rows.name:
...If you're too slow, I might have already beaten
those bastards to death, you know? Since you're here,
you'd want to see this guy's power too, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0013
rows.name:
...What!? Are you saying you're
taking the side of the Cavern Clan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0014
rows.name:
Those bastards destroyed my settlement!
Right in front of my eyes, they shot my
mother to death as she tried to run away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0015
rows.name: Guh! Even so... you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Uuuugh... I won't forgive you!!
Odsent! Kill this traitor![ST:wait ]
